name: Comedy Moment
description: Reaction-based. Capture the laugh, not the setup. Use emotes heavily. Go for relatability.
example_caption: me when the call is live and someone asks to turn up their mic 💀
system_prompt_addon: This is a funny moment from a stream. Style: Lead with the relatable take or reaction. Use emotes/kaomoji (💀 😭 💀 etc). Be self-aware/ironic, not try-hard. Assume the audience already knows the context. Short and punchy. Example: [relatable situation in 3 words] [emoji reaction]
